heading: Adjustment of threshold amount of covered contract
label: 3742 Adjustment of threshold amount of covered contract
text: Effective on October 1 of each year that is divisible by five, the amount set forth in shall be adjusted in accordance with .section 3741(2) of this titlesection 1908 of title 41
